headline: Dirty SOX
summary: The 30 semiconductor stocks in the Philadelphia SOX Index were up an average of 73% year-to-date through 5/11/26. Read more here.

headline: Microchip Technology Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Microchip Technology has significantly outperformed the broader market over the past year, and Wall Street analysts continue to maintain a highly bullish outlook on the stock’s long-term prospects.
